title: 500mm Wide Rolls Of Pink Anti Static Bubble Wrap For Packing Shipping & Storage (500mm x 25m)
features: Size/Dimensions:The width of the roll is 500mm / 50cm, simply select width and length from the menu above.

This anti-static small bubble wrap is perfect for anyone in need of a reliable packing solution. Our pink anti-static bubble wrap is for the protection of electrical products that are prone to static damage. The special bubble additive prevents the build up of static electricity by dissipating any surface charge, protecting the wrapped contents.

The bubble wrap comes in a beautiful pink colour which is perfect for those who want to add a pop of colour to their storage and shipping needs. Our pink bubble wrap is a high-quality product that will protect your items during transit.
Not only is this bubble wrap great for packing and storage, but it is also anti-static, making it perfect for electronic items that are sensitive to static electricity.

The small bubbles provide extra cushioning for delicate items, ensuring they remain safe during transport. This bubble wrap is suitable for use in various industries, from business and industrial to personal use, making it a versatile and practical choice.
